CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-10-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-04-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ONEMAIN IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT AMALIA GOOCO IN THE AMOUNT OF $7,825.18, INCLUSIVE OF COSTS. COUNSEL FOR ONEMAIN IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH COMPLIES WITH CCP 437C(G) AND STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT WHICH CONFORMS TO THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on the NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY PLAINTIFF ONEMAIN FINANCIAL GROUP, LLC as follows: Plaintiff Onemain Financial Group, LLC's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Onemain is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Amalia Gooco in the amount of $7,825.18, inclusive of costs. Counsel for Onemain is required to prepare a proposed order which complies with CCP 437c(g) and states that the motion was not opposed and a proposed judgment which conforms to the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
